rationale: Proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §22.0516, which governs alternative dispute resolution for school district professional employees. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A court in which a judicial proceeding is being brought against a professional employee of a school district may refer the case to an alternative dispute resolution procedure as described by Chapter 154, Civil Practice and Remedies Code.
_note: Rule concerns ADR for school employees; no fiscal or operational connection to homestead exemption amounts.
